languages.text: "Оставь его, Ферренц. Пусть этот несчастный доживет свой век с родной аугментацией. Ты все равно сможешь срезать ее после его смерти".
"Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."
languages.original_text: "Оставь его, Ферренц. Пусть этот несчастный доживет свой век с родной аугментацией. Ты все равно сможешь срезать ее после его смерти".

traits.locale_text: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."
"Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."
"Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."

languages.text: 「彼を放っておけ、フェレンツ。その貧しい男は、自分の増幅で人生を全うさせてくれ。死んだら、いつでも切れる」
languages.original_text: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."

traits.locale_text: 「彼を放っておけ、フェレンツ。その貧しい男は、自分の増幅で人生を全うさせてくれ。死んだら、いつでも切れる」

languages.text: "Adamı rahat bırak Ferrenz. Bırak da zavallı adam kendi ogmentasyonuyla hayatını yaşasın. Öldükten sonra sökebilirsin."
languages.original_text: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."

traits.locale_text: "Adamı rahat bırak Ferrenz. Bırak da zavallı adam kendi ogmentasyonuyla hayatını yaşasın. Öldükten sonra sökebilirsin."

languages.text: «Déjelo estar, Ferrenz. Que el pobre hombre viva lo que le queda con su aumento. Habrá tiempo de quitárselo cuando esté muerto».
languages.original_text: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."

traits.locale_text: «Déjelo estar, Ferrenz. Que el pobre hombre viva lo que le queda con su aumento. Habrá tiempo de quitárselo cuando esté muerto».

languages.text: “放他走吧，费伦茨。让这个可怜的家伙带着属于他自己的植入物度过余生吧。等他死了，你照样能把它切下来。”
languages.original_text: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."

traits.locale_text: “放他走吧，费伦茨。让这个可怜的家伙带着属于他自己的植入物度过余生吧。等他死了，你照样能把它切下来。”

languages.text: « Ça suffit, Ferrenz. Laissez ce pauvre homme terminer sa vie avec ses propres augmentations. Vous pourrez toujours les lui reprendre quand il sera mort. »
languages.original_text: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."

traits.locale_text: « Ça suffit, Ferrenz. Laissez ce pauvre homme terminer sa vie avec ses propres augmentations. Vous pourrez toujours les lui reprendre quand il sera mort. »

languages.text: "Lasst ihn, Ferrenz. Lasst den armen Kerl den Rest seines Lebens mit seiner eigenen Augmentation verbringen. Wenn er tot ist, könnt Ihr sie immer noch abschneiden."
languages.original_text: "Leave him be, Ferrenz. Let the poor fellow live out his life with his own augmentation. You can still cut it off after he's dead."

traits.locale_text: "Lasst ihn, Ferrenz. Lasst den armen Kerl den Rest seines Lebens mit seiner eigenen Augmentation verbringen. Wenn er tot ist, könnt Ihr sie immer noch abschneiden."
